hero.title: Illuminating Your Path,
hero.subtitle: to Seamless Productivity.
hero.description: Like a beam of light in the darkness, Lumea provides angelic solutions for your technical needs. Over 30+ professional tools that process everything locally in your browser secure, private, and effortless.
trust.title: Your privacy is our priority.
trust.description: Traditional online tools upload your sensitive documents to their servers. Lumea uses modern web technology to process everything right inside your browser.
site.title: Lumea - 30+ Online Utility Tools
site.description: Free, 100% client-side tools for PDF, Images, Text, and Developer needs. Your files never leave your browser.
ui.entropy_desc: Entropy is calculated based on character set size and password length.
ui.privacy_promise_desc: Your passwords never leave your computer. We don't log or store anything.
ui.crypto_api_desc: Generated using crypto.getRandomValues(), the industry standard for secure randomness.
ui.enter_decoded: Enter normal text or URL here...

ui.error_ocr_failed: OCR Failed. Please try another image.
ui.error_jpg_to_pdf_failed: Failed to convert images to PDF. Ensure all files are JPG or PNG.
ui.error_format_failed: Formatting failed. Please check your syntax.
ui.error_bg_remover_failed: Failed to remove background. Please try a different image.
ui.error_conversion_failed: Conversion failed. Please try a different file.
recent.title: Recent Tools
recent.subtitle: Tools you've used recently on this device.
cat.pdf.desc: Edit, convert, and manage your PDF documents.
cat.image.desc: Optimize, resize, and convert images instantly.
cat.text.desc: Clean up, count, and generate text content.
cat.dev.desc: Utilities for coding, encoding, and data formatting.
footer.privacy.desc: All processing happens in your browser. We never see your files.
ui.drop_files: Click or drag files to upload
ui.privacy_note: Your files are processed locally and never uploaded to any server.
ui.merge_privacy_desc: Your files never leave your computer. All PDF merging is performed locally in your browser to ensure 100% privacy and data security.
ui.split_privacy_desc: Your PDF files never leave your device. All splitting and extraction tasks are performed locally within your browser.
ui.watermark_privacy_desc: Your PDF never leaves your computer. All watermark processing happens entirely within your browser for maximum security.
ui.pdf_to_jpg_privacy_desc: Your PDF data never leave your computer. The conversion happens entirely within your browser's secure sandbox.
ui.pdf_to_jpg_pro_tip: Use the "PDF Split" tool first if you only need images from specific pages.
ui.pdf_to_word_privacy_desc: Your document data never leaves your browser. All text extraction and Word document generation happen locally on your device.
ui.high_fidelity_desc: For maximum accuracy, we recommend using the iLovePDF engine. It ensures your layout, fonts, and tables are preserved perfectly.
ui.bg_remover_desc: Remove image backgrounds instantly using high-precision AI. All processing happens locally in your browser for total privacy.
ui.no_diff: No differences detected. Both versions are identical.
ui.zero_dep_desc: The comparison system now uses a 100% internal engine without relying on the internet. We implemented an efficient Longest Common Subsequence (LCS) algorithm to detect line and word changes instantly and securely.
ui.pdf_to_excel_privacy_desc: All extraction happens locally. We never see your data, and your financial records remain exclusively on your device.
ui.qr_pro_tip_desc: Your data never leaves your device. The QR code is generated entirely in your browser, keeping your URLs and text 100% private.
ui.svg_privacy_desc: We render your SVG directly to a high-resolution canvas. No data is sent to external servers, ensuring your designs remain private.
ui.barcode_privacy_desc: Your data is never sent to any server. We generate all barcodes locally in your browser using high-fidelity rendering.
ui.code_privacy_desc: Your code never leaves your computer. We use Prettier directly in your browser to format your source code locally.
ui.markdown_privacy_desc: Everything stays on your machine. Your text is never sent to our servers. We value your privacy and intellectual property.
ui.excel_to_pdf_privacy_desc: Your financial and business data is handled with maximum security. Everything stays in your browser, and no data is sent to our servers.
ui.secure: 100% Secure: Files never leave your browser
ui.placeholder_text: Paste or type your text here...
ui.cropper_tip: Use the 1:1 ratio for perfect profile pictures.
ui.cropper_desc: Drag the handles to crop your image. Use presets for standard ratios.
ui.pdf_compress_desc: Optimize your PDF to reduce file size while maintaining readability.
ui.enter_url_text: Enter URL or text to encode...
ui.2d_reorder_desc: Drag pages freely in any direction. Our smart sorting engine will automatically calculate the new layout as you move.
ui.absolute_privacy_desc: Every interaction and preview generation happens locally. Your documents never touch a cloud server.
ui.browser_downloading: Your browser is downloading each page as a JPG image.
ui.high_quality_conv_desc: We use a 2.0x scale factor to ensure that the exported images are crisp and legible. Each page will be downloaded individually.
ui.markdown_placeholder: # Your Title Here\n\nWrite your content using **Markdown** syntax. The preview updates instantly on the right.
ui.pdf_to_word_why_desc: Converting PDF back to editable Word documents requires complex text structure reconstruction. We use iLovePDF to keep your paragraphs and formatting intact.
ui.pdf_to_excel_why_desc: Extracting tables from PDF to Excel requires highly accurate row and column detection. We use iLovePDF to provide the cleanest spreadsheet conversion results.
ui.word_to_pdf_why_desc: Converting Word documents to PDF while preserving complex layouts and fonts is best handled by professional-grade rendering engines.
ui.excel_to_pdf_why_desc: Converting spreadsheets to professional PDF tables requires precise grid alignment. We ensure your data presentation remains perfect.
blog.title: Lumea Guides
blog.subtitle: Expert advice on digital privacy, file optimization, and developer productivity.
blog.share: Share it with others who might find these tools useful!
blog.coming_soon_desc: We're currently writing helpful content for all our 30+ tools.
blog.philosophy.title: The Lumea Philosophy
blog.philosophy.text: Lumea, a name inspired by the essence of 'Light'. We believe that in every technical challenge you face, Lumea appears as a beam of light in the darkness—arriving to provide solutions with the grace of a helping angel. We are here to illuminate your productivity path, making it simpler, safer, and seamless.
blog.how.title: How Lumea Works
blog.how.subtitle: Privacy-first architecture designed for the modern web.
blog.how.step1.title: No Uploads
blog.how.step1.text: Unlike other tools, we don't send your files to any server. Everything happens inside your browser.
blog.how.step2.title: Local Processing
blog.how.step2.text: Your device does the hard work. We use powerful client-side libraries to process data instantly.
blog.how.step3.title: Total Privacy
blog.how.step3.text: Since your data never leaves your device, your sensitive documents remain 100% private and secure.

guide.markdown.h1: How to use the Markdown Editor
guide.markdown.p1: Our Markdown Editor provides a seamless writing experience with instant visualization and professional export options.
guide.markdown.f1_d: See your formatted text immediately as you type with our side-by-side view.
guide.markdown.f2_d: Convert your Markdown to clean HTML code with one click for use in websites or emails.
guide.markdown.f3_d: Your content is never uploaded. Everything happens in your browser for total privacy.
guide.pdf-to-word.p1: Lumea uses advanced text extraction to convert your PDF documents into Microsoft Word (.docx) files without sending any data to a server.
guide.pdf-to-word.f1_d: All text content remains selectable and editable in the resulting Word document.
guide.pdf-to-word.f2_d: Your confidential documents stay on your computer throughout the entire conversion process.
guide.pdf-to-word.f3_d: We reconstruct the document structure based on the original PDF text positioning.
guide.word-to-pdf.p1: Convert your Microsoft Word documents (.docx) to PDF format instantly in your browser.
guide.word-to-pdf.f1_d: Preserve text, formatting, and images from your Word document.
guide.word-to-pdf.f2_d: No files are ever uploaded. Your sensitive documents stay on your machine.
guide.word-to-pdf.f3_d: Get your PDF in seconds without any subscription or watermarks.
guide.excel-to-pdf.p1: Transform your Excel data into professional PDF reports instantly.
guide.excel-to-pdf.f1_d: Convert individual sheets or the entire workbook into a PDF.
guide.excel-to-pdf.f2_d: Data is formatted into clean, readable tables in the resulting PDF.
guide.excel-to-pdf.f3_d: Your spreadsheets are processed locally. Your financial data stays private.
guide.pdf-to-excel.h1: Extract Tables from PDF to Excel
guide.pdf-to-excel.p1: Convert your PDF documents into editable Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets with smart table detection.
guide.pdf-to-excel.f1_d: Automatically detects rows and columns to reconstruct your tables.
guide.pdf-to-excel.f2_d: The resulting file is fully compatible with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.
guide.pdf-to-excel.f3_d: Process your sensitive financial reports safely on your own device.
guide.organize.p1: Manage your PDF structure with ease. Reorder pages by dragging them or remove unwanted ones with a single click.
guide.organize.f1_d: Visual interface to change page order intuitively.
guide.organize.f2_d: Remove any page from your document permanently.
guide.organize.f3_d: See high-quality previews of every page before saving.

guide.merge.s1: Select multiple PDF files from your computer.
guide.merge.s2: Arrange the files in the desired order by removing and re-adding them.
guide.merge.s3: Click "Merge PDFs" to combine them into one document.
guide.merge.p1: Lumea uses the powerful pdf-lib library to process your documents locally. Your sensitive data never travels over the internet, making it the most secure way to handle corporate or personal documents.
guide.split.p1: Our split tool allows you to extract specific pages or ranges from a large PDF document into separate files.
guide.split.f1_d: Specify exactly which pages you need (e.g., 1-5, 8, 10-12).
guide.split.f2_d: See page thumbnails to ensure you are selecting the right content.
guide.split.f3_d: Pages are extracted without re-encoding, preserving original resolution.
guide.rotate.p1: Easily fix upside-down or sideways PDF documents. You can rotate individual pages or the entire document at once.
guide.rotate.f1_d: Rotate clockwise or counter-clockwise to any orientation.
guide.rotate.f2_d: The rotation is saved into the file metadata, so it stays fixed in any viewer.
guide.watermark.p1: Add professional text watermarks to your PDF files to protect your intellectual property or mark documents as confidential.
guide.watermark.f1_d: Choose your own text, font size, and opacity.
guide.watermark.f2_d: Apply the watermark to all pages or a specific range automatically.
guide.jpg-to-pdf.p1: Combine your photos, scans, or screenshots into a single, professional PDF document.
guide.jpg-to-pdf.f1_d: Upload many images at once and arrange them in order.
guide.jpg-to-pdf.f2_d: Images are automatically sized to fit standard A4 or Letter pages.
guide.pdf-to-jpg.p1: Convert your PDF pages into high-quality JPG images for easy sharing on social media or in presentations.
guide.pdf-to-jpg.f1_d: Each PDF page becomes a separate image file.
guide.pdf-to-jpg.f2_d: Maintains the original clarity of text and graphics.
guide.compressor.p1: Our compressor uses advanced algorithms to remove unnecessary data from your images without affecting how they look to the human eye. This process happens entirely in your browser using Web Workers for maximum speed.
guide.compressor.f1_d: High-quality compression modes keep your photos looking sharp.
guide.compressor.f2_d: Your photos are never uploaded to our servers. All processing is local.
guide.compressor.f3_d: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP compression.
guide.compressor.p2: For most web uses, a quality setting between 70% and 80% offers the best balance between file size and visual clarity. If you need absolute perfection for printing, use 90% or higher.
guide.background-remover.p1: Lumea uses the advanced MediaPipe Selfie Segmentation model to identify subjects in your photos and remove the background with high precision.
guide.background-remover.f1_d: Most background removers send your personal photos to a server. Lumea does all the AI math right on your computer's GPU/CPU.
guide.background-remover.f2_d: Download your result as a transparent PNG, ready for use in designs or presentations.
guide.background-remover.f3_d: No credits, no subscriptions, just unlimited removals.
guide.vectorizer.p1: Vector images (SVG) are mathematically defined, meaning they can be scaled to any size without losing quality or becoming "pixelated". This is essential for logos, icons, and illustrations.
guide.vectorizer.f1_d: Our tool traces the edges of your image to create clean, reusable vector paths.
guide.vectorizer.f2_d: Generated SVGs are lightweight and ready to be used in your code.
guide.vectorizer.f3_d: Choose between "Logo" for sharp edges or "High Detail" for complex images.
guide.resizer.p1: Whether you need to fit a specific social media requirement or reduce dimensions for a presentation, our resizer gives you pixel-perfect control.
guide.resizer.f1_d: Keep the proportions of your image intact automatically.
guide.resizer.f2_d: Uses high-quality interpolation for clean results.
guide.resizer.f3_d: Handle high-resolution photos safely on your own device.
guide.converter.p1: Not sure which image format to use? This guide breaks down WebP, PNG, and JPG comparisons to help you choose the right format for your needs.
guide.converter.f1_d: The best choice for modern websites. It offers superior compression and supports transparency.
guide.converter.f2_d: Use this for logos, icons, and graphics that require perfect clarity and transparency support.
guide.converter.f3_d: The standard for photographs and complex images where a small file size is more important than perfect detail.
guide.qr-generator.p1: QR codes are a versatile way to bridge the gap between physical and digital worlds. Lumea allows you to generate them with custom colors and high resolution for printing.
guide.qr-generator.f1_d: Generate as many as you need, no strings attached.
guide.qr-generator.f2_d: Match your brand by changing the QR and background colors.
guide.qr-generator.f3_d: We don't track what you encode. Everything is generated on your machine.
guide.word-counter.p1: Our word counter is designed for writers, students, and professionals who need accurate text statistics without compromising their privacy. Unlike other online tools, Lumea processes your text entirely on your device.
guide.word-counter.f1_d: Counts update in real-time as you type.
guide.word-counter.f2_d: Get counts for words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences, and paragraphs.
guide.word-counter.f3_d: Estimated based on an average reading speed of 225 words per minute.
guide.word-counter.s1: Paste your text into the input area above.
guide.word-counter.s2: The statistics will automatically update in the top boxes.
guide.word-counter.s3: You can use the "Copy" button to save your work or "Clear" to start over.
guide.case-converter.p1: Easily format your text for any purpose. Whether you're coding, writing a headline, or fixing accidentally toggled CAPS LOCK, we have you covered.
guide.case-converter.f3_d: Capitalizes The First Letter Of Each Word.
guide.case-converter.f4_d: Capitalizes the first letter of each sentence.
guide.lorem-ipsum.p1: Lorem ipsum is the industry standard for placeholder text. It mimics the natural distribution of letters and words in English, making it perfect for layout testing without distracting the viewer with readable content.
guide.lorem-ipsum.f1_d: Best for filling large content areas.
guide.lorem-ipsum.f2_d: Ideal for short descriptions or feature lists.
guide.lorem-ipsum.f3_d: Perfect for labels, buttons, or titles.
guide.json-formatter.p1: Lumea JSON Formatter is a powerful tool for developers to clean up messy JSON data. It validates your syntax as it formats, helping you spot missing commas or brackets quickly.
guide.json-formatter.f1_d: Adds proper indentation and newlines for readability.
guide.json-formatter.f2_d: Removes all whitespace to reduce file size.
guide.json-formatter.f3_d: Shows exactly where your JSON structure is broken.
guide.base64.p1: Base64 is a group of binary-to-text encoding schemes that represent binary data in an ASCII string format by translating it into a radix-64 representation.
guide.base64.f1_d: All conversions happen in your browser; no data is sent to any server.
guide.password-generator.h1: Why use a Secure Password Generator?
guide.password-generator.p1: Using unique, complex passwords for every account is the single most important step you can take to protect your online identity. Lumea's generator ensures that your passwords are truly random.
guide.password-generator.p2: We use the Web Crypto API to generate random values. Unlike Math.random(), which is not suitable for security, crypto.getRandomValues() provides strong random numbers.
guide.url-tool.p1: URL encoding, also known as percent-encoding, is a mechanism for encoding information in a Uniform Resource Identifier (URI).
guide.url-tool.f1_d: Useful for preparing query parameters or handling complex redirect URLs.
guide.uuid-generator.p1: A Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) is a 128-bit number used to uniquely identify information in computer systems. Version 4 UUIDs are based on random numbers.
guide.cropper.p1: Crop your photos to any size or aspect ratio quickly and easily with our professional image cropper.
guide.cropper.f1_d: Choose from standard 1:1, 4:3, or 16:9 ratios for social media.
guide.cropper.f2_d: All processing happens in your browser.
guide.pdf-compressor.p1: Reduce the file size of your PDF documents without losing quality.
guide.diff-checker.p1: Compare two versions of text to see exactly what has changed.
guide.color-picker.p1: Find and convert colors for your design projects.
guide.code-formatter.p1: Clean up your messy source code instantly. We support HTML, CSS, and JavaScript formatting using industry-standard Prettier engine.
guide.code-formatter.step1_d: Paste your unformatted or minified source code into the dark editor window. Your code stays private in your browser.
guide.code-formatter.step2_d: Select the appropriate language parser (JavaScript, HTML, or CSS) to ensure correct formatting rules are applied.
guide.code-formatter.step3_d: Click "Beautify Code" to transform your code into a clean, readable format. Then use the copy button to grab the result.
ui.barcode_data_invalid: Invalid data for this barcode type
ui.barcode_preview_error: Fix the errors in settings to update the preview.
ui.ocr_ready_desc: Click the magic wand to extract text from your image.
ui.ocr_neural_desc: We now apply automatic image pre-processing to boost contrast and text sharpness before AI scanning. The result is far more accurate on blurry or dark images.
guide.barcode-generator.p1: Create industry-standard barcodes for your retail, inventory, or logistics needs instantly without any tracking.
guide.barcode-generator.s1_d: Choose from various standards like Code 128 (general purpose), EAN-13 (retail), or UPC-A (North American retail).
guide.barcode-generator.s2_d: Enter the text or numeric code you want to encode. The preview will update instantly to show your barcode.
guide.barcode-generator.s3_d: Once satisfied, download your barcode as a high-resolution PNG image ready for printing on labels or packaging.
guide.svg-to-png.h1: How to convert SVG to PNG
guide.svg-to-png.p1: Turn your vector graphics into high-quality raster images for web, social media, or presentations without losing sharpness.
guide.svg-to-png.s1_d: Upload your .svg file. You will see an instant preview of your vector artwork in the dashboard.
guide.svg-to-png.s2_d: Adjust the width and height or use the scaling buttons (1x to 8x) to define your desired output size.
guide.svg-to-png.s3_d: Click "Convert SVG to PNG" to render the image. Your high-quality PNG will be downloaded automatically.
guide.ocr.p1: Digitize your physical documents, screenshots, and photos instantly with our private, on-device AI scanner.
guide.ocr.s1_d: Drop your image (JPG, PNG, WebP) into the upload area. For best results, ensure the text is clear and well-lit.
guide.ocr.s2_d: Choose the primary language of the text in the image. This helps the AI recognize characters more accurately.
guide.ocr.s3_d: Click "Extract Text". Once finished, your editable text will appear in the result box, ready to be copied or edited.
ui.color_picker_tip: Pro tip: Use the eyedropper tool in your browser's color picker to grab colors from anywhere on screen.
